headline: Director of AI at Alliance Laundry Systems
title: Director of AI
confidenceNote: Attendee-provided title and location are specific, and public LinkedIn posts connect Alex Paluzzi with Alliance Laundry Systems in digital products and AI contexts; I did not find a direct public profile independently confirming the exact Director of AI title.
bioMarkdown: AI leader at Alliance Laundry Systems, likely focused on applying AI and digital product strategy to commercial laundry operations, partner enablement, and service efficiency. Useful match for attendees working on industrial AI, connected equipment, or practical AI adoption in legacy operating environments.

primary.label: Alliance Laundry Systems official site
primary.note: Company describes itself as a global laundry solutions leader with innovation and technology as core themes.

primary.label: Alliance Laundry Systems innovation page
primary.note: Company page emphasizing technology and innovation in commercial and residential laundry.

secondary.label: Flavio Mello LinkedIn post
secondary.note: Mentions Alliance Laundry Systems LATAM strategy work around Digital Products and AI and thanks Alex Paluzzi for support.

secondary.label: Walter Fontes LinkedIn post
secondary.note: Mentions Alex Paluzzi as part of Alliance Laundry Systems representation around technology and digital transformation at The Clean Show 2025.

secondary.label: Speed Queen Commercial AI article
secondary.note: Alliance Laundry Systems CTO commentary on AI use cases such as predictive maintenance and customer service in laundromats.

headline: Head Capability Development at DSTA
title: Head Capability Development
confidenceNote: Public LinkedIn search result and organizational-directory data align on DSTA and capability/strategic communications responsibilities; older DSTA social posts connect him to data analytics work.
bioMarkdown: DSTA capability-development leader working at the intersection of defence technology, strategic communications, and data-driven public-sector systems. Strong match for conversations about government AI adoption, defence innovation, analytics, and capability planning.

headline: Founder and CEO at Solen Software Group
title: CEO and Founder
confidenceNote: Solen's official team page confirms Alexander Spencer as Founder & CEO and provides biography; LinkedIn and X search results align with the same identity and company.
bioMarkdown: Founder and CEO of Solen Software Group, a long-term buyer and operator of mission-critical software businesses. Brings founder, M&A, and operating perspective for attendees exploring vertical SaaS, durable software companies, and AI-enabled operational transformation.

primary.label: Solen Software Group team page
primary.note: Official bio lists Alexander Spencer as Founder and CEO and describes his software entrepreneurship background.

headline: Corporate Fellow, Applied AI at AMD
title: Corporate Fellow, Applied AI
confidenceNote: AMD official blog and investor release confirm Alex Starr as Corporate Fellow with deep AMD tenure, Applied AI leadership, and hardware verification/emulation background.
bioMarkdown: AMD Corporate Fellow leading Applied AI work that brings agentic workflows into chip design and engineering productivity. Strong match for attendees interested in AI for complex engineering, verification, silicon design, and high-rigor enterprise AI adoption.

primary.label: AMD blog - How Agentic AI Is Reshaping Chip Design
primary.note: Official AMD article states Alex Starr is a Corporate Fellow leading Applied AI and the Shift Left AI team.

primary.label: AMD investor release - Corporate Fellow promotion
primary.note: AMD release confirms Corporate Fellow appointment and contributions in emulation and validation methodologies.

secondary.label: Mark Papermaster LinkedIn post
secondary.note: AMD CTO post references Alex Starr discussing AI in chip design and verification.

secondary.label: GarysGuide event listing
secondary.note: Event listing identifies Alex Starr as Corporate Fellow at AMD and describes Shift Left AI leadership.

headline: AI Evangelist and host of ThursdAI at W&B from CoreWeave
title: AI Evangelist & Host of ThursdAI
confidenceNote: ThursdAI's official guest page and multiple event/podcast profiles confirm Alex Volkov as host/curator and AI Evangelist at Weights & Biases; CoreWeave's acquisition of W&B is confirmed by official CoreWeave/W&B sources.
bioMarkdown: Host and curator of ThursdAI and AI Evangelist at Weights & Biases, now part of CoreWeave. Useful match for builders tracking frontier model releases, open-source AI, evals, MLOps, and high-signal AI community conversations.
